title: Fantasy Prehistorical Origins
description: Adds a range of Pre-historic creature themed races, with a magical fantasy twist!
body:
# 🐉Pre-historical Fantasy Origins🐉
This origins datapack currently adds 5 new dinosaur-themed origins, each with a twist that adds something fantastical to their concept.

# 📜Origins📜

<details>
<summary>🌠Astroptera - "Star Wing"🌠</summary>
Winged creatures of the stars, dominating the night sky as they outshine all others.
- Tier 1
  
- Flight [Sprint]: Spread your glorious wings to soar across the skies like a shooting star!
- All-Seeing Star: You can use your senses to detect creatures through nearby surfaces.
- Solar Cry [Primary]: Every 10 seconds, you can release a solar beam attack to damage your enemies.
- Circadian Rhythm: The light of the sun limits your abilities, whereas the moon's light grants you greater power, as you absorb its pure magic.
- Screech [Secondary]: You unleash a powerful cry. All entities within a 6 block radius are launched away a distance from you.
- Nocturnal: You are physically unable to rest at night, as if a greater power wills you to stay awake.
- Starshine: Your body glows to creatures that see it.
</details>



<details>
<summary>🏃‍♂️Styradromeus - "Spiked Runner"🏃‍♂️</summary>
The little predecessor of a once greater dinosaur!
- Tier 2

- Tracking: You are an adept hunter, able to track those you have begun to hunt.
- Charge [Primary]: You can charge forward into enemies, knocking them back.
- Slash [Secondary]: Leap forwards, swiping at anything infront with your claws.
- Thief: When crouching near somebody for long enough without anything in your mainhand, you're able to right click on them to force them to drop whatever they're holding in their mainhand.
- Momentum: Your powerful legs allow you to build up to faster speeds.
- All fours!: When there's nothing in your hands, you move faster.
- Wall Runner: You are descended from an apex predator, able to traverse even the steepest cliffs.
- Carnivore: Eating anything other than meat can be harmful to you.
- Strong Culture: You refuse to wear any armour other than dyed leather.

</details>



<details>
<summary>🔥Rex-Inferorum - "King of Hell"🔥</summary>
A great lumbering beast of the Nether.
- Tier 2

- Hellfire Roar [Primary]: You unleash a burning roar of power, decimating any creature near you, and launching them away.
- Fire Immunity: Your blood heralds from the nether, granting you resistance against even the hottest temperatures.
- Armoured Body: You are covered in thick bony plates, which protect you from danger.
- Large Body: Due to your ancestry, you are noticeably larger than the average creature.
- Store Momentum [Crouch]: Holding crouch allows you to store momentum that can be then released in a single jump, or press your secondary to cancel it.
- Petravore [Attack]: Due to a lack of food in the nether, your ancestors adapted to absorbing nutrients within stone and coal.
- Heavy weight: You're too heavy to swim, and sink to the bottom of the water.
- Extinguish: Water is not good for you. You can deal with it in small amounts, but your tolerance is limited.

</details>



<details>
<summary>⚫Umbraloch - "Shadow Hunter"⚫</summary>
A master of disguise, capable of being one with the darkness.
- Tier 3

- Hide [Crouch]: You are so adept at hiding, that you are able to seemingly hide from the world itself.
- Bloodlust: Instead of using hunger points, you feed on xp. You gan xp when you hit a creature, feeding your need for violence.
- Frail: Due to your smaller, stealthier body, you can't take as many hits as normal.
- Right Behind You: When you get hit, teleport behind the person who hit you.
- Shadow Merge: The darker it gets, the more invisible you become.

</details>



<details>
<summary>💨Dilitranoidon - "Poison-Toothed Breather"💨</summary>
A particularly toxic creature 
- Tier 1

- Gas Burst [Secondary]: Releases a powerful Gas that temporarily paralyses and poisons nearby creatures.
- Tainted Sight: After being exposed to your toxic gas constantly, your eyes aren't as effective as they would be.
- Scavenge [Primary]: You can scavenge for food around your immediate area. [64 block distance between scavenges, with a 1-minute cooldown in each area).
- Decreased Bone Density: In order to launch yourself, you are much lighter, and therefore can't take as many hits.
- Gas Launch [Jump]: Use high pressure gas to launch yourself forward.
- Piscivore: You're unable to digest tough meats, and can only eat fish.

</details>
